column1: # Dual-OTA layout for 8MB flash. Two ~3MB app slots let the running firmware
# write a new image to the inactive slot and switch (with rollback). nvs and
# spiffs keep their offsets from no_ota_8mb.csv so a one-time USB reflash onto
# this table PRESERVES wifi creds/settings (nvs) and characters (spiffs).
# nvs ends at 0xe000: PlatformIO writes boot_app0.bin (otadata init) there on
